prose:
Fukui reactivity indices were computed for aniline (14 atoms) using DFT at tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0 / multiplicity 1 for the neutral species (cation: +1/doublet; anion: −1/doublet). Charge partitioning: Mulliken (PySCF). Fukui indices were constructed by finite differences from N, N+1, and N−1 single-point calculations.

Headline result: most electrophilic site = C-3 (ortho carbon), f⁺ = 2.2975867; most nucleophilic site = N-1 (amino nitrogen), f⁻ = 0.20452359. These results are consistent with aniline's well-known ortho/para-directing NH₂ group and its nucleophilicity at nitrogen.

Integrity: trustworthy = true. All charge-conservation checks passed (sum(f⁺) = sum(f⁻) = 1.0000). No warnings reported.
